updated_at.description: Legacy only ever populates this field in mode:fixture (a static fixtureUpdatedAt literal); Serpstat's real getKeywords response has no per-record timestamp field, matching legacy's live (non-fixture) read path emitting the raw JSON-RPC record verbatim with no updated_at key at all. Declared for catalog parity with legacy's published Fields (serpstat.go's streams()), not because the live API sends it.
